task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

content.text: I'll create a well-structured 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda and save it as a file right away!

input.content:
=====================================================
         Q3 KICKOFF MEETING AGENDA
=====================================================
Duration: 90 Minutes
Format:   In-Person / Virtual
-----------------------------------------------------

WELCOME & OPENING                                 (0:00 – 0:05)  [5 min]
  • Meeting host opens the session
  • Quick housekeeping (recording, norms, parking lot)

-----------------------------------------------------

1. Q2 RETROSPECTIVE & PERFORMANCE REVIEW         (0:05 – 0:20)  [15 min]
  • Review Q2 goals vs. actuals (KPIs, OKRs, revenue, etc.)
  • Key wins to celebrate
  • Missed targets and lessons learned
  • Carry-over items into Q3

-----------------------------------------------------

2. COMPANY PRIORITIES & STRATEGIC CONTEXT        (0:20 – 0:35)  [15 min]
  • Leadership update: company direction and top priorities for Q3
  • Market / competitive landscape changes
  • How Q3 fits into the annual plan
  • Q&A on strategic direction

-----------------------------------------------------

3. Q3 GOALS, OKRs & SUCCESS METRICS             (0:35 – 0:55)  [20 min]
  • Present team-level OKRs / goals for Q3
  • Define key results and how they will be measured
  • Assign goal owners and accountability checkpoints
  • Discussion: gaps, dependencies, or concerns

-----------------------------------------------------

4. INITIATIVES, ROADMAP & PRIORITIES            (0:55 – 1:10)  [15 min]
  • Walk through the Q3 project/initiative roadmap
  • Prioritization: what's in scope, what's out of scope
  • Resource allocation and cross-team dependencies
  • Risks and mitigation plans

-----------------------------------------------------

5. TEAM ALIGNMENT & WAYS OF WORKING             (1:10 – 1:20)  [10 min]
  • Communication norms and meeting cadence for Q3
  • Tooling or process changes
  • Hiring, onboarding, or team structure updates
  • Any policy or operational updates

-----------------------------------------------------

6. OPEN DISCUSSION & Q&A                         (1:20 – 1:28)  [8 min]
  • Open floor for questions, concerns, or ideas
  • Address parking-lot items

-----------------------------------------------------

WRAP-UP & NEXT STEPS                             (1:28 – 1:30)  [2 min]
  • Recap key decisions made in the meeting
  • Confirm owners and deadlines for immediate action items
  • Share when meeting notes/recording will be distributed

=====================================================
ACTION ITEMS LOG (to be completed during meeting)
-----------------------------------------------------
  #  | Action Item          | Owner       | Due Date
  ---|----------------------|-------------|----------
  1  |                      |             |
  2  |                      |             |
  3  |                      |             |
=====================================================

content.text:
The agenda has been saved as **q3_kickoff_agenda.txt**! Here's a summary of how the 90 minutes are structured:

| # | Section | Time | Duration |
|---|---------|------|----------|
| — | Welcome & Housekeeping | 0:00–0:05 | 5 min |
| 1 | Q2 Retrospective & Performance Review | 0:05–0:20 | 15 min |
| 2 | Company Priorities & Strategic Context | 0:20–0:35 | 15 min |
| 3 | Q3 Goals, OKRs & Success Metrics | 0:35–0:55 | 20 min |
| 4 | Initiatives, Roadmap & Priorities | 0:55–1:10 | 15 min |
| 5 | Team Alignment & Ways of Working | 1:10–1:20 | 10 min |
| 6 | Open Discussion & Q&A | 1:20–1:28 | 8 min |
| — | Wrap-up & Next Steps | 1:28–1:30 | 2 min |

The agenda also includes a blank **Action Items Log** at the bottom so owners and due dates can be captured live during the meeting. Let me know if you'd like to adjust any sections, timing, or topics!
